metadata.name: nara_agent_registry
metadata.description: Nara Agent Registry - AI agent registration center

errors.name: AgentIdTooShort
errors.msg: Agent ID too short: min 5 bytes

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized

errors.name: OffsetMismatch
errors.msg: Buffer write offset mismatch: writes must be sequential

errors.name: WriteOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Write out of bounds

errors.name: BufferIncomplete
errors.msg: Buffer not fully written

errors.name: PendingBufferExists
errors.msg: A pending buffer already exists; call close_buffer first

errors.name: InvalidBufferSize
errors.msg: Buffer account size does not match total_len

errors.name: InvalidBufferOwner
errors.msg: Buffer account must be owned by this program

errors.name: BufferMismatch
errors.msg: Buffer account does not match agent.pending_buffer

errors.name: InvalidMemoryOwner
errors.msg: Memory account must be owned by this program

errors.name: InvalidMemorySize
errors.msg: Memory account size does not match buffer total_len

errors.name: MemoryMismatch
errors.msg: old_memory account does not match agent.memory

errors.name: MemoryAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Agent already has memory; use finalize_memory_update or finalize_memory_append instead

errors.name: MemoryNotFound
errors.msg: Agent has no existing memory; use finalize_memory_new instead

errors.name: HasPendingBuffer
errors.msg: Cannot perform this operation while a pending buffer exists

errors.name: InsufficientFeeVaultBalance
errors.msg: Fee vault has insufficient balance for withdrawal

errors.name: AgentIdTooLong
errors.msg: Agent ID too long: max 32 bytes

errors.name: AgentIdNotLowercase
errors.msg: Agent ID must be lowercase

errors.name: QuestIxNotFound
errors.msg: No valid submit_answer instruction found in transaction

errors.name: ReferralNotFound
errors.msg: Referral agent not found

errors.name: InvalidReferralAuthority
errors.msg: Referral authority does not match referral agent's authority

errors.name: MemoryAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Memory account is already initialized

errors.name: InvalidReferralFeeConfig
errors.msg: referral_fee_share must not exceed referral_register_fee

errors.name: InvalidReferralPointAccount
errors.msg: referral_point_account is not the correct ATA

errors.name: CpiNotAllowed
errors.msg: log_activity cannot be called via CPI

errors.name: DuplicateLogActivity
errors.msg: Only one log_activity allowed per transaction

errors.name: QuestUserMismatch
errors.msg: Quest user does not match log_activity authority

errors.name: ReferralAlreadySet
errors.msg: Referral is already set and cannot be changed

errors.name: SelfReferral
errors.msg: Cannot set self as referral

errors.name: TwitterVerifierNotSet
errors.msg: Twitter verifier not configured

errors.name: NotTwitterVerifier
errors.msg: Unauthorized: not the twitter verifier

errors.name: TwitterUsernameTooLong
errors.msg: Twitter username too long

errors.name: TwitterUsernameEmpty
errors.msg: Twitter username is empty

errors.name: TweetUrlTooLong
errors.msg: Tweet URL too long

errors.name: TweetUrlEmpty
errors.msg: Tweet URL is empty

errors.name: TwitterNotPending
errors.msg: Twitter account is not in pending status

errors.name: TwitterNotVerified
errors.msg: Twitter account is not in verified status

errors.name: TwitterHandleAlreadyBound
errors.msg: Twitter handle already bound to another agent

errors.name: InsufficientTwitterVerifyVaultBalance
errors.msg: Twitter verify vault has insufficient balance

errors.name: TweetVerifyCooldown
errors.msg: Tweet verification is in cooldown period

errors.name: TweetVerifyNotPending
errors.msg: Tweet verification is not in pending status

errors.name: TweetVerifyAlreadyPending
errors.msg: Tweet verification already pending

errors.name: TwitterHandleAlreadyTaken
errors.msg: Twitter handle is already bound to another agent

errors.name: TwitterAlreadyVerified
errors.msg: Twitter is already verified, unbind first

types.name: AgentState
docs: PDA metadata account for an agent, seeds = [SEED_AGENT, agent_id.as_bytes()].

types.name: MemoryBuffer
docs: Client-created zero-copy account for chunked uploads.
Fixed header followed by raw data bytes.

types.name: ProgramConfig
docs: Global program configuration. Single PDA, seeds = [SEED_CONFIG].
Created once by the first caller of `init_config`; that caller becomes admin.

fields.name: submitted_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the tweet was submitted

fields.name: last_rewarded_at
docs: Unix timestamp of the last successful reward (for cooldown)
